chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI H.C.A. No.289 of 2018 ---------------------------------------------------------------------------- Date Order with signature of Judge ---------------------------------------------------------------------------- Hearing of Case 1.For orders on office objection. 2.For hearing of main case. 10-05-2022 Mr.Muhammad Amin, Advocate for the Appellants. Mr.Rafique Ahmed Kalwar, Advocate for Respondent No.10. ---- After arguing the matter at some length, learned counsel for the appellants, while confronted to point out any error or illegality in the impugned order, has submitted that the appellants will be satisfied and will not press instant appeal provided the appellants may be allowed to ask for production of the documents from respondent No.10 which may be required for the purposes of verification of the claim of the appellant and for disposal of the subject Suit No.1126/2013, seeking rendition of accounts by private respondent, however, the appellants are not seeking any claim against P.S.O. in the aforesaid suit. Per learned counsel for the respondent does not oppose the disposal of instant appeal in the aforesaid terms, however, submits that the respondent will not in any manner be liable or responsible for any claim of the appellant pursuant to some agreement between appellants and the private respondents, which is subject matter of the suit, which may be decided as per pleadings in accordance with law. Accordingly, by consent instant appeal stands disposed of in the above terms. Judge Judge nasir
